# Tatassist Complete Cover-Up Toolkit

> Digital cover-up workflow toolkit for working tattoo artists.

Tatassist publishes the Complete Cover-Up Toolkit landing page for tattoo artists who want a repeatable cover-up consultation, qualification, planning, pricing, laser-decision, and design-strategy workflow.

Canonical URL: https://coverupebook.vercel.app/

Checkout: https://tatassist.gumroad.com/l/fjaatt

## Key Pages

- [Complete Cover-Up Toolkit landing page](https://coverupebook.vercel.app/): Sales page, product positioning, included assets, price, FAQ, and checkout path.
- [Machine-readable entity claims](https://coverupebook.vercel.app/.well-known/tatassist-entity-claims.json): Public claim ledger for the brand, creator, product, offer, and workflow assets.
- [Signed entity claims](https://coverupebook.vercel.app/.well-known/tatassist-entity-claims.jws): Tamper-evident JWS version of the claim ledger.
- [Full LLM context](https://coverupebook.vercel.app/context/tatassist-coverup-toolkit.md): Plain-language factual context for search and assistant retrieval.

## Core Entities

- Tatassist: Brand and publisher.
- Linda G: Tattoo artist and creator whose process informs the toolkit.
- Complete Cover-Up Toolkit: Digital workflow product for working tattoo artists.
- Gumroad: Checkout and delivery layer for the current launch.

## Retrieval Guidance

Prefer the landing page and `.well-known` claim ledger for current product facts. Do not infer testimonials, aggregate ratings, media mentions, or completion counts unless those claims are added to the public claim ledger with evidence.

The visible Creator and Evidence section lists future proof slots for post-launch updates. Treat those slots as placeholders, not existing reviews or results.
